programme.desc: After decades devoted to careers and family, these senior contestants enter a new chapter of life. Golden Age Talentime follows their journey as they rediscover long-held music dreams. The brand-new series will continue the team battle concept, creating a platform with greater diversity and excitement for the seniors to have an equal chance to stay till the end.

programme.title: Chill.Hike.Camping - EP 14 / 港女野人奇遇记
programme.desc: The four beautiful hosts embark on an exotic adventure to challenge themselves to explore secret places in the mountains and seas of New Zealand. They climb the sacred volcano of the indigenous Maori people, set foot on the pure ice soil of the highest mountain range, canoe across the mysterious canyon and also look for dolphins.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 252
programme.desc: Nature's Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2 krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 261
programme.desc: This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you're simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 315
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 313
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol and Mirtoselect—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurre

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 260
programme.desc: South Korea's no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity.

programme.title: Kampung Foodsteps S2: Heritage Edition - EP 3 / 脚踏食地之时光印迹
programme.desc: Popular content creator Phei Yong returns to Kelantan, shooting in Bahasa Kelate for the first time, which Darren couldn’t understand. Together, they play Gasing Uri, which leads to humorous moments.

programme.title: Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4 - EP 5 / 川味 第四季(下)
programme.desc: In Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4, the director, Bin Ge and his team will continue to go deep into the countryside, following the smell of cooking, using the camera once again, to interpret the tie or relationship between people and food. In this documentary, we will see how people's life have changed, how food is in tune itself with the human palate, and how people can know or understand the taste

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 13 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Business fails to improve. Zhen Bang overcomes his fear of knives and improves on the soup base with Buffett's help. Zhen Bang encourages Buffett to improve on her physique, who then trains for the Muay Thai match with Tian Yong's guidance. Customers return as the restaurant launches a steamboat buffet system. Unfortunately, tensions arise among members of the team, especially Tian Yong and Da Ji.

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 14 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Using the hours Zhen Bang owed Buffett as stakes, the two of them compete against each other. Zhen Bang wins but Buffett is upset as she misunderstands his intentions. Zhen Bang's father Ah Hei is caught for molesting, and this affects Zhen Bang's sister, Meng Ting's wedding plans. Ah Hei suffers a heart attack, and the siblings finally meet. Zhen Bang admits that he murdered his brother.

programme.title: (Live) Singapore Today / 狮城六点半
programme.desc: Daily updates on local news headlines and stories.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 447 / 天之骄女
programme.desc: Feeling uneasy, Xiulian and the others go to find Zhihong. Jialiang poses as a doctor to enter the Oda clinic in search of Zixiang, but when he attempts to question Hero, Qichang hypnotizes him again.

programme.title: Proud Of You (Ep351-450) - EP 448 / 天之骄女
programme.desc: Jiansi vows revenge for Zhihong and cuts ties with Wenxue. When Xiulian and the others confront her, Wenxue accidentally reveals Tianyou’s disfigurement.

programme.title: (Live) The Sheng Siong Show S39 - EP 11 / 缤纷万千在昇菘 39
programme.desc: The second semi-final of the Royal Golden Grain Children Singing Competition heats up further! This episode also features internet sensation Ariel Tsai (蔡佩轩) from Taiwan, whose sweet vocals will leave you wanting more.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Breakout Brothers 2 / 逃狱兄弟 2
programme.desc: Ho Chun, a young entrepreneur, is sent to jail. By implementing his philosophy in the business world that money can solve any problems, Ho Chun offers Big Roller, Kin-Tin, Scar and Ho-Ching a considerable amount of money for assisting him to breakout from jail.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 9 / 寄生
programme.desc: Luo Ye Ye's days are numbered as his diabetes worsen, and is affecting his kidneys. Shi Yuan and Luo Ye Ye are about to face life and death, and this reminded Yun Cong of the time his mother left him. Yun Ze decides to fill Luo Ye Ye's remaining days with nothing but joy, not leaving any regrets.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 10 / 寄生
programme.desc: Xiu Huan is finally released from prison after 20 years. She went back to her old residence, and cried as she was reminded of Yun Cong. Yun Cong and Yun Ze happened to pass by, but they did not recognise her. Xiu Huan bumps into Zhao Hua when she was seeking medical treatment at Kang Long hospital. When Zhao Hua calls Yun Cong and tells him about it, Yun Cong could not believe it!

programme.title: Hawker Academy - EP 6 / 小贩学院
programme.desc: This week's contestants face the biggest challenge of the series. They have to make Wonton Mee from scratch. Besides being slow in learning, both apprentices also cannot handle the fast-paced morning crowd, disappointing their mentor even on the final day. How will their final challenge unfold?

programme.title: Thrift Hunters - EP 6 / 我赚到了
programme.desc: This new program will be introducing a variety of discounts at shops and restaurants, as well as some free activities to our audience. Besides getting more information about saving, the most important thing is, we can gain happiness, health, time, experience and conveniences, in order to make our life more fulfilling and happy.

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 5 / 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: In order to track down the USB, Guo Tai asked her adopted daughter, Ke Xin to search Jess's grandfather's apartment by posing as Jess's classmate. However, nothing was found. After Xiao Tian and Guo Tai learnt of Jess and Man Ting's argument, they suspected that the USB lies with Man Ting. They tasked Jia Ming to court her in order to find the USB.......

programme.title: C. L. I. F. 5 - EP 6 / 警徽天职之海岸卫队
programme.desc: While looking through the CCTV footage in search for Jess' murderer, Ze Feng spots a man with a tattoo on one arm acting suspiciously. When Jia Hao delivers fish to Xiao Ying, Ze Feng sees a similar tattoo on Jia Hao's arm and thus arrests him. However, Jia Hao is released as he has an alibi.

programme.title: Old Taste Detective - EP 8 / 古早味侦探
programme.desc: Beef Noodle is a common dish among the Chinese nowadays. Each region has its own variation of this dish. In this episode, host Yi Feng and Chef Jason visit various local famous Beef Noodles stalls to learn about the cooking technique to recreate the old taste of the Hainanese Beef Noodle.

programme.title: News Tonight / 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Fix My Life - EP 1 / 整你的人生
programme.desc: The Master of Decluttering' Fan She De is sharing his experiences onstage. With his signature gesture, he encourages attendees to raise their arms and shoutout Fix My Life', thereafter throw out unnecessary items on stage to an enthusiastic crowd. Just six months ago, Fan She De has nothing, how did he become the Master of Decluttering'?

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: Dupree stays on as a houseguest with the newlyweds, much to the couple's annoyance.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Eight very different couples and their love lives intertwine during a hectic month before Christmas in London.

programme.title: Music and Lyrics
programme.desc: Eyeing a comeback, former pop star Alex is asked to write a song for a teenage superstar. When Alex recognises house sitter Sophie's talent for words, he must convince her to help him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: An archeology expert joins an Indian professor to look for a lost treasure of India. However, things take a dangerous turn when they are ambushed in their quest.

programme.title: What Men Want
programme.desc: Magically able to hear what men are thinking, a sports agent uses her new-found ability to turn the tables on her obnoxious male colleagues while working to sign the next basketball superstar.

programme.title: The Lake House
programme.desc: Love blooms when Kate, a doctor, exchanges letters with Alex, an architect who is fed up with his life. Unknown to them, they lead lives two years apart.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Gene is a smartphone emoji who can show a wide range of emotions instead of just one. When he makes a mistake that threatens his life, he sets out to become normal like his fellow emojis.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Various couples strive to overcome challenges in their personal lives, as they face highs and lows in their romantic relationships.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Fletcher Reede is a successful defence lawyer who has greatly benefitted from the habit of lying. His life takes an ugly turn when his son wishes for him to become incapable of lying for a day.

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: A traitorous clansman bids to locate and then unleash the deadly 'Five Venom Spider' against those who bid to stand in his way.

programme.title: Vengeance Is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: In this tale of greed, lust and vengeance, only Silver Swallow can stop the golden blade.

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: Betty Loh, Grace Ting and Diana Chang star in this romantic comedy between a gifted scholar and the administrative official's daughter he falls for at first sight.

programme.title: The Scandalous Warlord
programme.desc: According to this sex comedy, the true power behind China's many warlords were the prostitutes that these men would visit.

programme.title: The Grand Substitution
programme.desc: Winner of Best Picture in the 12th Asian Film Festival, this Huangmei Opera epic stars Li Li Hua and Ivy Ling Po in a romance that stretches across the decades.

programme.title: Heroes Shed No Tears
programme.desc: Alexander Fu Sheng stars in this movie as a man who is supposed to die from a cut by a sword with a teardrop forged onto its blade.

programme.title: The Dancing Millionairess
programme.desc: One of the most enjoyable musicals to grace the Hong Kong screen, this classic stars the husband-and-wife team of Peter Chen and Betty Loh.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Directed by Ho Meng Hua, this film depicts the currents that buoy two families, sweeping them toward revenge in the wake of an unexpected reunion.

programme.title: The Twin Bracelets
programme.desc: Problems ensue after one of two childhood friends who have vowed to become sisters through the exchange of bracelets gets married.

programme.title: The Knight of Knights
programme.desc: In seeking to avenge his six comrades' murders, a swordsman must battle against Qiao Qing Monastery's notorious monks.

programme.title: Hell Has No Boundary
programme.desc: When a detective's bullet changes direction in mid-air to zero in on its target, a terrifying supernatural connection comes to light.

programme.title: The Empress Dowager
programme.desc: Lisa Lu stars as the dragon lady of the Ching Dynasty in this film that is full of palace intrigues and power games.

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: This seminal film adaptation of a 17th century Pu Songling work is the precursor of the famed 'A Chinese Ghost Story'.

programme.title: Human Lanterns
programme.desc: An insane swordsman takes to making Chinese lamps from the skin of his enemies' sisters, mistresses and wives!

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: Starring Kara Hui, Yuen Tak and Meng Yuen Man, this film depicts a series of battles as everyone fights over the 'Yuan Yang Swords', which hold the secrets to Kung Fu.

programme.title: The Tiger and the Widow
programme.desc: A woman gets involved in a Ching Dynasty salt smuggling ring that stinks of missing persons and dilemmas gone rotten.

programme.title: Have Sword Will Travel
programme.desc: A drifter (David Chiang) and another swordsman (Ti Lung) are competitors for a woman's love who fate turns into brothers in arms.

programme.title: The Last Tempest
programme.desc: The court intrigues, politicking, bickering and backstabbing continues in this sequel to The Empress Dowager. Starring Lisa Lu.

programme.title: Rape of the Sword
programme.desc: When a swordswoman falters in her attempt to reclaim her murdered husband's 'Green Sword', the world's sharpest blade, her protg continues her quest.

programme.title: The Lark
programme.desc: 60s pop star Carrie Ku Mei plays pop star 'Little Lark' in her greatest role, in this romance that features some of the most popular Mandarin songs of all time.

programme.title: The Twelve Gold Medallions
programme.desc: Loyal to the emperor, the protagonist attempts to stop the delivery of a message depicted across twelve gold medallions that is to be delivered by traitors.

programme.title: Shaolin Martial Arts
programme.desc: When the Emperor employs Manchu boxers to eradicate the Shao Lin martial artists, see how two escapees begin a quest to restore the reputation of Shao Lin.

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: This delightful action comedy featuring international favourite Alexander Fu Sheng presents a breathtaking showcase of wushu and wizardry.

programme.title: Hex After Hex
programme.desc: In this comedy, hellish emotions are unleashed when a demon arranges to have his true love killed in order to possess her. Starring Lo Meng.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: When Kuan, a guard at the Tien Ying Treasury House, falls for his boss's granddaughter, it isn't long before he begins plotting the elimination of his rival.

programme.title: Duel of Fist
programme.desc: In this thriller by Chang Cheh, David Chiang and Ti Lung play two skilled boxers, one of whom finds his half brother in the Thai underworld.

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Director Chang Cheh joins forces with Ni Kuang and martial arts choreographer Liu Chia-liang to craft this brilliant saga from the golden age of kung fu films.

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 45
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 12
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 120
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 35
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 13
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 13
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 86
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?
